alerts.title: BREAKING: Major military operation announced in Gaza Strip
alerts.content: Israeli Defense Forces announce commencement of targeted operation in northern Gaza following intelligence reports of weapon storage facilities. Operation expected to last 48-72 hours with coordinated air and ground components.

alerts.title: EU Ministers convene emergency session on escalation
alerts.content: European Union foreign ministers called for emergency virtual meeting to discuss coordinated response to Middle East escalation. Meeting scheduled for 16:00 UTC with focus on humanitarian aid and diplomatic intervention.

alerts.title: State Department issues updated travel advisory
alerts.content: US State Department elevates travel advisory for Lebanon and Syria to Level 4: Do Not Travel. Advisory cites increased military activity and potential for rapid escalation in border regions.

alerts.title: Ukrainian forces report Russian buildup near Kharkiv
alerts.content: Ukrainian Ministry of Defense reports increased Russian military presence near Kharkiv region. Satellite imagery confirms movement of armored vehicles and artillery units over past 24 hours.
